reason: Verify global stack, authority-chain, Stage 1/2, and source-of-truth constraints.
Check RVV plugin locality, typed body authority, selected-body realization, provider-owned mapping, and fail-closed diagnostics.
Check common EmitC/export still consumes provider-built route payloads without inferring RVV semantics.
Check focused FileCheck/C++/runtime evidence, mirror-only authority rejection, and active-authority scan coverage.
Check route-family migration follows the recently accepted select-family pattern without broadening scope.
Check store route behavior/evidence remains intact.
Check load-store route behavior/evidence remains intact.
Check route operand binding closure remains authoritative for materialized operands and mirrors.
